title: Shable's Tweaks
description: A assortment of random texture tweaks fixing some inconsistencies with the vanilla textures
body:
### I've made this Resourcepack with fixes and tweaks that bother me in the vanilla game, nothing too game changer really! I'll be updating this Pack at the rate i keep playing the game and finding more stuff to tweak...

Some features may need optifine (or mcmeta) to work, overall most of it should work fine


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
A Full list of features in the Resourcepack:

<details>
<summary>Chests Revamped!</summary>
  
- Regular Chest:
![Regular Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/051d7bd3d92d5c9aba49df58ab84eaee03f57f28.png)
- Trapped Chest:
![Trapped Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38503b081de22ea20c4bf2662f8d9cc9b28e8ea4.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Oak Consistency!</summary>

- Oak is now more consistent:
![Oak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ece8975d69d9d5b4054e65b0a72b8ca85643c73.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Prettier Shrooms!</summary>

- Regular Mushrooms now look bigger and nicer:
![Better Mushrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f2974d8d47310437527eab2452e932f76a7b745.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Sicker Compass!</summary>

-The Compass now looks more alike with the Recovery Compass:
![Nicer Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c6fe2cd306e206a13b1c328a403ff3ba11231df.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Bluellagers!</summary>

- Blue Villagers, (it sounded funny):
![Blue Villager and Wandering Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/950662be6ad835df87c7086fd4b90ae175c7ac63.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Custom Block Models!</summary>

-No more ashes on Unlit Campfire and mossier Moss Carpet:
![Unlit Campfire without ashes and Moss Carpet with dripping sides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43baafbf3c123192d37792652bcd2651e4b6f524.png)
-No more Z-fighting on Iron Bars:
![Z-Fighting fixed on Iron Bars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdf3d28eed19b68fe8b8f18f8a7b8290c822bc2e.png)
</details>

</details>

FAQ:

Q: **Can i use this pack on my Modpack/Server?**
A: Sure! Just please credit me or add a link to this page!

Q: **I have some ideas for you to add! where can i send them?**
A: You can send me ideas on my Twitter! [@squaredGolem](https://twitter.com/squaredGolem)
